---
title: Rosa Bonheur
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557439/rosabonheur_20210708_gsabpr.png
description: Le rosa Bonheur à Vincennes
categories: [urbansketch]
date: 2021/07/08
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557439/rosabonheur_20210708_gsabpr.png)
